prompt: I need a website for my business.
Build a quantum AI blockchain app that runs instantly without servers.
Create a CRM where the sales team can delete customers but the sales team has read-only access to all data.
Build an app for managers and employees. Anyone can edit anything.
Build a database that stores a lot of unstructured data with a UI on top.
Create a secure banking app where no passwords are required and everyone shares one account.
Build an app that automatically reads the user's mind and predicts their next search.
Create a platform to sell things online.
